about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: Bien-être Shop, born from a passion for better living
about.missionText: Making authentic and effective wellness products accessible to everyone in Guinea, Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana and beyond. We believe that self-care is a right, not a luxury.
about.value1Text: Carefully selected products whose quality we guarantee.
about.value2Text: Fair and transparent pricing in your local currency.
about.value3Text: Attentive customer service, available to support you.

footer.poweredBy: Crafted with care for your wellbeing.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Bien-être Shop is committed to protecting the privacy of its customers. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacyPage.section1Text: When placing an order, we collect the following information: first name, last name, phone number, email address, and delivery address. This data is necessary to process and deliver your order.
privacyPage.section2Text: Your personal data is used exclusively to: process and confirm your order, contact you via WhatsApp or email for delivery details, and improve our customer service. We never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacyPage.section3Text: Our site uses your IP address to automatically detect your country and display prices in your local currency. This information is temporarily stored in your browser's local storage (localStorage) for 24 hours and is not transmitted to third parties.
privacyPage.section4Text: We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. We only use browser local storage (localStorage) to remember your language and currency preferences during your visit.
privacyPage.section5Text: Your data is transmitted over secure connections (HTTPS). We retain your order information only for as long as necessary to fulfill your order.
privacyPage.section6Text: In accordance with applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights: access to your personal data, correction of inaccurate information, deletion of your data, and objection to the processing of your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at the address below.
privacyPage.section7Text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, contact us via the contact form or by WhatsApp.
